html:
LEDGIX
Ledgix Retail Store
Fast POS • Inventory • Profit Tracking
Sales Receipt
Invoice:{{ doc.invoice_number or doc.name }}
Date:{{ frappe.utils.formatdate(doc.sale_date, "dd-MM-yyyy") }}
Customer:{{ doc.customer or "Walk-in Customer" }}
Cashier:{{ doc.owner }}
Shift:{{ doc.pos_shift or "-" }}
{% for item in doc.items %} {% endfor %}
Item Qty Rate Total
{{ item.item_name or item.item }} {{ item.quantity }} {{ item.rate }} {{ item.amount }}
Subtotal: {{ doc.subtotal_before_discount or doc.total_amount }}
Discount: {{ doc.discount_amount or 0 }}
Tax: {{ doc.tax_amount or 0 }}
Total: {{ doc.grand_total or doc.total_amount }}
Paid: {{ doc.paid_amount }}
Change: {{ doc.change_amount }}
Status: {{ doc.payment_status }}
Payment Breakdown
{% for payment in doc.payments %}
{{ payment.payment_method }} {{ payment.amount }}
{% endfor %}
{% if doc.fbr_invoice_number %}
FBR Digital Invoice
FBR Invoice No:{{ doc.fbr_invoice_number }}
FBR Status:{{ doc.fbr_status or "Submitted" }}
Submitted At:{{ doc.fbr_submitted_at or "-" }}
QR/Logo:Not configured
{% endif %}
Thank you for shopping with us
Powered by Ledgix POS
name: Ledgix Thermal Receipt
